name: Grilled Tuna Steak with Lemon-Caper Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the butter, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, lemon zest, mustard, and capers. Set aside.
2. Prepare a hot fire. Brush the tuna steaks with oil. Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon lemon juice over the fish. Place the steaks on an oiled grill set 4 to 6 inches from the coals. Grill, turning once, until firm and opaque at the center, about 10 to 12 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and top each steak with 1 tablespoon lemon-caper butter.
